wellness_categories.name: Hair Growth & Scalp Health
wellness_categories.description: Support healthy hair growth, scalp circulation, and follicle vitality through plants that nourish from root to tip.

wellness_categories.name: Skin Health & Radiance
wellness_categories.description: Promote clear, resilient, and vibrant skin through plants that support collagen, hydration, and cellular renewal.

wellness_categories.name: Eye & Vision Support
wellness_categories.description: Protect and nourish the eyes with plants that support visual acuity, retinal health, and reduce oxidative stress.

wellness_categories.name: Oral & Dental Health
wellness_categories.description: Strengthen teeth, gums, and the oral microbiome with antimicrobial and mineralizing plant allies.

wellness_categories.name: Cardiac & Circulatory Support
wellness_categories.description: Strengthen heart function, improve blood flow, and support healthy blood pressure through cardiovascular plant allies.

wellness_categories.name: Immune Resilience

wellness_categories.name: Inflammation Balance

wellness_categories.name: Digestive Wellness

wellness_categories.name: Liver & Detoxification
wellness_categories.description: Support liver function and the body's natural detoxification pathways with hepatoprotective plant allies.

wellness_categories.name: Respiratory Vitality
wellness_categories.description: Strengthen lung capacity, improve breathing, and support respiratory tissue health with expectorant and tonic plants.

wellness_categories.name: Nervous System Balance
wellness_categories.description: Regulate and restore the nervous system with nervine herbs that calm, tonify, and support neurological function.

wellness_categories.name: Stress Resilience
wellness_categories.description: Build adaptive capacity and buffer against chronic stress through adaptogenic and calming plant allies.

wellness_categories.name: Sleep & Rest
wellness_categories.description: Improve sleep quality, support healthy circadian rhythms, and deepen restorative rest with sedative and relaxant herbs.

wellness_categories.name: Cognitive & Brain Support
wellness_categories.description: Enhance memory, focus, and mental clarity with nootropic and neuroprotective plants that support brain health.

wellness_categories.name: Mood & Emotional Balance
wellness_categories.description: Support emotional well-being, stability, and joy with plants that gently modulate neurotransmitter activity.

wellness_categories.name: Hormonal Harmony
wellness_categories.description: Support endocrine balance and healthy hormone production with plants that nourish glands and modulate hormonal pathways.

wellness_categories.name: Bone & Joint Support
wellness_categories.description: Strengthen bones, support joint flexibility, and reduce stiffness with mineralizing and anti-inflammatory plants.

wellness_categories.name: Muscle Recovery & Repair
wellness_categories.description: Support muscle repair, reduce soreness, and promote physical recovery with anti-inflammatory and circulatory plants.

wellness_categories.name: Energy & Vitality
wellness_categories.description: Build sustainable energy, stamina, and overall vitality through tonic and adaptogenic plants that nourish without depleting.

wellness_categories.name: Longevity & Healthy Aging
wellness_categories.description: Support cellular health, antioxidant protection, and graceful aging with plants traditionally revered for longevity.

wellness_categories.name: Reproductive Wellness
wellness_categories.description: Support fertility, libido, and reproductive health with plants that nourish the reproductive system across all life stages.

wellness_categories.name: Kidney & Urinary Health
wellness_categories.description: Support kidney function, urinary tract health, and fluid balance with diuretic and kidney-tonic plants.

wellness_goals.name: Promote Hair Growth
wellness_goals.description: Stimulate hair follicles and support new growth through improved scalp circulation and nutrient delivery.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Thicker, fuller hair with reduced thinning and shedding
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Several herbs improve scalp microcirculation and provide follicle-nourishing compounds.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Scalp massage, adequate protein intake, and stress management complement herbal support.

wellness_goals.name: Strengthen Hair Structure
wellness_goals.description: Provide minerals, silica, and nutrients that strengthen the hair shaft from within.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Reduced breakage, improved elasticity and shine
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Silica-rich and mineral-dense plants support keratin formation and hair resilience.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Biotin-rich foods and gentle hair care practices enhance results.

wellness_goals.name: Improve Skin Clarity
wellness_goals.description: Support clear, blemish-free skin through detoxification, inflammation modulation, and antimicrobial action.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Reduced breakouts, even skin tone, and clearer complexion
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Blood-purifying and anti-inflammatory herbs have long traditions in skin care across multiple herbal systems.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Hydration, reducing processed foods, and gentle skincare routines amplify results.

wellness_goals.name: Support Skin Elasticity
wellness_goals.description: Nourish collagen production and protect against oxidative damage that accelerates skin aging.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Firmer, more supple skin with improved moisture retention
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Antioxidant-rich plants protect collagen and support skin cell regeneration.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Sun protection and adequate vitamin C intake work synergistically with herbal support.

wellness_goals.name: Protect Visual Acuity
wellness_goals.description: Nourish the retina and support sharp, clear vision with antioxidant and circulation-enhancing plants.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Maintained or improved visual sharpness and reduced eye strain
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Anthocyanin-rich and lutein-supporting plants have clinical evidence for retinal protection.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Reduce screen time, practice the 20-20-20 rule, and ensure adequate lighting.

wellness_goals.name: Reduce Eye Fatigue
wellness_goals.description: Soothe tired, strained eyes and support healthy tear production and ocular circulation.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Less eye strain, dryness, and irritation
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Traditional eye-tonic herbs have been used for centuries to relieve visual fatigue.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Regular breaks from close work and adequate hydration support eye comfort.

wellness_goals.name: Strengthen Teeth & Gums
wellness_goals.description: Support gum tissue integrity, reduce inflammation, and provide mineralizing support for strong teeth.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Healthier gums, reduced bleeding, and stronger enamel
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Antimicrobial and astringent herbs have strong traditional use for oral health across cultures.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Oil pulling, proper brushing technique, and reducing sugar intake complement herbal approaches.

wellness_goals.name: Support Oral Microbiome
wellness_goals.description: Promote a healthy balance of oral bacteria while reducing harmful pathogens naturally.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Fresher breath, reduced plaque formation, and balanced oral flora
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Several antimicrobial herbs selectively target pathogenic oral bacteria while supporting beneficial flora.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Probiotic foods and avoiding harsh mouthwashes help maintain oral microbial balance.

wellness_goals.name: Strengthen Heart Function
wellness_goals.description: Tonify cardiac muscle, support healthy rhythm, and improve overall heart efficiency.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Stronger heart contractions, stable rhythm, and improved cardiac output
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Cardiotonic herbs like hawthorn have significant clinical evidence for heart support.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Regular cardiovascular exercise, stress management, and omega-3 fatty acids complement herbal support.

wellness_goals.name: Improve Circulation
wellness_goals.description: Enhance blood flow to extremities and vital organs through vasodilating and blood-thinning plant allies.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Warmer extremities, improved tissue oxygenation, and better nutrient delivery
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Warming and circulatory-stimulant herbs have robust traditional and clinical evidence.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Movement, hydration, and avoiding prolonged sitting enhance circulatory function.

wellness_goals.name: Build Immune Strength
wellness_goals.description: Strengthen baseline immune function and increase resistance to common infections.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Fewer infections, faster recovery, and more robust immune responses
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Immunomodulating herbs have extensive clinical evidence for enhancing immune cell activity.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Adequate sleep, regular exercise, and stress management are foundational for immune health.

wellness_goals.name: Reduce Infection Risk
wellness_goals.description: Provide antimicrobial, antiviral, and antifungal protection through plant-based immune defense.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Greater resistance to pathogens and reduced frequency of illness
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Many antimicrobial herbs show broad-spectrum activity against bacteria, viruses, and fungi.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Good hygiene, nutrient-dense diet, and adequate vitamin D support pathogen resistance.

wellness_goals.name: Reduce Chronic Inflammation
wellness_goals.description: Modulate the body's inflammatory response and reduce systemic inflammation through anti-inflammatory plant compounds.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Lower inflammatory markers, reduced pain, and improved tissue health
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Curcuminoids, boswellic acids, and other plant compounds have strong clinical evidence for inflammation modulation.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Anti-inflammatory diet, regular movement, and stress reduction are essential foundations.

wellness_goals.name: Support Healthy Inflammatory Response
wellness_goals.description: Help the body mount appropriate inflammatory responses when needed while preventing excessive or chronic activation.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Balanced inflammation — effective when needed, resolved when not
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Adaptogenic and immunomodulating herbs help calibrate inflammatory pathways.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Omega-3 fatty acids, quality sleep, and gut health support balanced inflammation.

wellness_goals.name: Improve Digestion & Absorption
wellness_goals.description: Enhance digestive enzyme activity, improve nutrient absorption, and support healthy gut motility.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Better nutrient uptake, reduced bloating, and comfortable digestion
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Bitter and carminative herbs have centuries of documented use for improving digestive function.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Mindful eating, chewing thoroughly, and eating on a regular schedule enhance digestive function.

wellness_goals.name: Support Gut Lining Integrity
wellness_goals.description: Heal and protect the intestinal lining with demulcent and mucilaginous plants that soothe and repair.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Reduced gut permeability, less digestive discomfort, and improved barrier function
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Mucilaginous herbs coat and protect the GI tract and have traditional and emerging clinical support.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Bone broth, fermented foods, and avoiding gut irritants complement herbal support.

wellness_goals.name: Support Liver Function
wellness_goals.description: Protect hepatocytes, enhance Phase I and Phase II detoxification, and promote healthy bile flow.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Improved toxin clearance, better fat digestion, and overall metabolic health
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Silymarin and other hepatoprotective compounds have robust clinical evidence for liver support.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Reducing alcohol, processed foods, and environmental toxin exposure supports liver health.

wellness_goals.name: Enhance Natural Detoxification
wellness_goals.description: Support the body's innate detoxification pathways through lymphatic, hepatic, and renal-supportive plants.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Improved toxin elimination, clearer skin, and more energy
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Alterative herbs that support multiple detox organs have long traditions across herbal systems.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Adequate hydration, sweating through exercise or sauna, and fiber intake support detox pathways.

wellness_goals.name: Strengthen Lung Capacity
wellness_goals.description: Tonify respiratory tissue, improve oxygen exchange, and support deep, full breathing.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Greater breathing capacity, improved endurance, and clearer airways
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Pulmonary tonic herbs have extensive traditional use for strengthening respiratory function.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Breathwork practices, regular aerobic exercise, and clean air exposure enhance lung health.

wellness_goals.name: Clear & Protect Airways
wellness_goals.description: Support healthy mucus production, clear congestion, and protect respiratory tissue from irritants.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Easier breathing, reduced congestion, and resilient respiratory passages
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Expectorant and demulcent herbs effectively support airway clearance and protection.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Steam inhalation, nasal rinsing, and avoiding air pollutants complement herbal respiratory care.

wellness_goals.name: Regulate Nervous System
wellness_goals.description: Support healthy autonomic nervous system function, including balanced sympathetic and parasympathetic activity.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Greater emotional stability, improved stress response, and calm alertness
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Nervine tonic herbs modulate neurotransmitter activity and support nervous system resilience.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Vagal toning exercises, meditation, and time in nature support nervous system regulation.

wellness_goals.name: Support Nerve Health
wellness_goals.description: Nourish and protect nerve tissue, support myelin sheath integrity, and promote healthy nerve signaling.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Reduced tingling or numbness, improved nerve conduction, and neuroprotection
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Neuroprotective plants provide antioxidant protection and support nerve growth factors.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: B-vitamin-rich foods, adequate omega-3 intake, and blood sugar stability support nerve health.

wellness_goals.name: Build Adaptive Capacity
wellness_goals.description: Strengthen the body's ability to adapt to physical, mental, and emotional stressors through adaptogenic support.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Greater resilience to stress, more even energy, and improved recovery from challenges
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Adaptogenic herbs have significant clinical evidence for modulating the HPA axis and stress hormones.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Regular sleep schedule, movement, and social connection are foundational for stress resilience.

wellness_goals.name: Calm the Stress Response
wellness_goals.description: Gently downregulate an overactive stress response and promote parasympathetic activation.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Reduced anxiety, lower cortisol, and a greater sense of ease
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Anxiolytic and nervine herbs effectively support calm without sedation.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Breathwork, progressive relaxation, and limiting stimulant intake enhance calming effects.

wellness_goals.name: Improve Sleep Quality
wellness_goals.description: Deepen sleep, reduce nighttime waking, and support restorative sleep cycles with sedative and relaxant herbs.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Falling asleep more easily, sleeping more deeply, and waking refreshed
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Several sedative herbs have clinical evidence for improving sleep latency and quality.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Consistent sleep schedule, dark bedroom, and limiting screens before bed enhance herbal sleep support.

wellness_goals.name: Support Circadian Rhythm
wellness_goals.description: Help regulate the body's natural sleep-wake cycle and promote healthy melatonin production.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: More consistent sleep timing and improved alignment with natural light cycles
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Certain herbs support the pineal gland and natural melatonin synthesis.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Morning sunlight exposure, consistent wake times, and avoiding blue light at night are essential.

wellness_goals.name: Enhance Memory & Focus
wellness_goals.description: Improve working memory, concentration, and mental clarity with nootropic and cerebrovascular plants.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Sharper recall, sustained focus, and clearer thinking
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Nootropic herbs like ginkgo and bacopa have clinical evidence for cognitive enhancement.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Mental exercises, adequate sleep, and regular physical activity support cognitive function.

wellness_goals.name: Protect Brain Health
wellness_goals.description: Provide neuroprotection against oxidative stress and age-related cognitive decline.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Long-term brain health preservation and reduced risk of cognitive decline
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory plants show neuroprotective effects in clinical and preclinical studies.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Mediterranean diet, social engagement, and lifelong learning support neuroprotection.

wellness_goals.name: Uplift Mood Naturally
wellness_goals.description: Support healthy serotonin and dopamine activity with plants that gently elevate mood.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: More stable, positive mood and greater emotional resilience
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: St. John's Wort and saffron have clinical evidence comparable to conventional mood support.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Regular exercise, sunlight exposure, and social connection are powerful mood supporters.

wellness_goals.name: Emotional Steadiness
wellness_goals.description: Reduce emotional volatility and support a calm, grounded emotional baseline.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Less reactivity, greater equanimity, and emotional clarity
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Nervine and adaptogenic herbs support emotional regulation through multiple pathways.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Mindfulness practice, journaling, and creative expression complement herbal emotional support.

wellness_goals.name: Balance Hormone Production
wellness_goals.description: Support healthy hormone synthesis and metabolism across the endocrine system.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: More regular cycles, stable energy, and balanced mood related to hormonal function
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Phytoestrogenic and hormone-modulating herbs have clinical evidence for endocrine support.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Reducing endocrine disruptors, stress management, and adequate fat intake support hormonal health.

wellness_goals.name: Support Thyroid Function
wellness_goals.description: Nourish and modulate thyroid activity for balanced metabolic function.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Stable metabolism, healthy energy levels, and balanced body temperature
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Certain adaptogens and iodine-containing plants support thyroid regulation.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Selenium-rich foods, stress reduction, and avoiding goitrogens in excess complement thyroid support.

wellness_goals.name: Strengthen Bone Density
wellness_goals.description: Provide mineralizing support and promote osteoblast activity for strong, resilient bones.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Maintained or improved bone density and reduced fracture risk
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Mineral-rich and silica-containing plants support bone matrix formation.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Weight-bearing exercise, adequate calcium and vitamin D, and K2 support bone health.

wellness_goals.name: Improve Joint Flexibility
wellness_goals.description: Reduce joint stiffness and inflammation while supporting cartilage health and synovial fluid production.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Greater range of motion, less stiffness, and more comfortable movement
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Anti-inflammatory and connective tissue-supporting herbs have evidence for joint health.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Gentle movement, stretching, and maintaining healthy weight reduce joint stress.

wellness_goals.name: Accelerate Recovery
wellness_goals.description: Support faster muscle repair after exertion through anti-inflammatory and circulatory-enhancing plants.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Reduced soreness, faster return to activity, and improved tissue repair
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Anti-inflammatory and adaptogenic herbs support recovery by modulating inflammation and cortisol.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Adequate protein, sleep, and active recovery enhance muscle repair.

wellness_goals.name: Reduce Muscle Tension
wellness_goals.description: Relax tight, overworked muscles and relieve spasms with antispasmodic and muscle-relaxant plants.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Less muscle tightness, reduced cramps, and greater physical comfort
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Antispasmodic herbs have traditional and clinical evidence for relieving muscle tension.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Magnesium-rich foods, stretching, and warm baths complement herbal muscle relaxation.

wellness_goals.name: Build Sustainable Energy
wellness_goals.description: Increase vitality and stamina without the crash of stimulants, using tonic and adaptogenic plants.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Steady, lasting energy throughout the day without depletion
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Adaptogenic and qi-tonic herbs have evidence for improving sustained energy and reducing fatigue.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Blood sugar stability, adequate hydration, and regular movement support sustained energy.

wellness_goals.name: Overcome Fatigue
wellness_goals.description: Address the root causes of chronic tiredness through adrenal nourishment and mitochondrial support.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Reduced fatigue, improved motivation, and greater physical endurance
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Adrenal-supportive and mitochondrial-nourishing herbs address fatigue at multiple levels.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Sleep optimization, iron and B12 status, and pacing activity levels help resolve fatigue.

wellness_goals.name: Support Cellular Health
wellness_goals.description: Provide antioxidant protection, support telomere health, and promote healthy cellular turnover.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Slower biological aging, reduced oxidative damage, and vibrant cellular function
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Polyphenol-rich and antioxidant herbs have evidence for protecting against age-related cellular damage.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Caloric moderation, fasting protocols, and regular exercise support cellular longevity.

wellness_goals.name: Graceful Aging
wellness_goals.description: Support the body's vitality and function across decades with rejuvenating rasayana and tonic herbs.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Maintained physical and cognitive function, vitality, and quality of life with age
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Rasayana and longevity-tonic herbs from Ayurvedic and Chinese traditions have centuries of documented use.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Community engagement, purposeful living, and continued learning are longevity essentials.

wellness_goals.name: Support Fertility
wellness_goals.description: Nourish reproductive health and support hormonal conditions favorable for conception.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Improved reproductive function and hormonal readiness for conception
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Reproductive-tonic herbs have traditional and emerging clinical evidence for fertility support.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Stress reduction, optimal body weight, and reducing environmental toxins support fertility.

wellness_goals.name: Enhance Libido
wellness_goals.description: Support healthy sexual desire and function through plants that nourish reproductive vitality.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Improved sexual desire, arousal, and satisfaction
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Aphrodisiac herbs have traditional use and some clinical evidence for enhancing libido.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Stress management, adequate sleep, and relationship health support sexual vitality.

wellness_goals.name: Support Kidney Function
wellness_goals.description: Nourish and protect the kidneys with tonic herbs that support filtration and fluid balance.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Healthy kidney filtration, balanced fluid levels, and reduced kidney stress
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Kidney-tonic herbs from TCM and Western herbalism support renal function and protection.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Adequate hydration, moderate sodium, and avoiding nephrotoxic substances protect kidney health.

wellness_goals.name: Urinary Tract Health
wellness_goals.description: Maintain a healthy urinary tract and prevent infections through antimicrobial and anti-adhesion plants.
wellness_goals.desired_outcome: Reduced UTI frequency, comfortable urination, and healthy urinary flora
wellness_goals.evidence_summary: Antimicrobial and diuretic herbs have clinical evidence for urinary tract support.
wellness_goals.lifestyle_notes: Adequate water intake, prompt urination, and proper hygiene support urinary health.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Rich in silica, iron, and sulfur that nourish hair follicles and improve scalp circulation.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Traditional hair tonic used as rinse or tea; supports growth through mineral delivery.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tea rinse on scalp 3x weekly, or 2-3 cups daily as infusion.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Improves scalp microcirculation and stimulates hair follicle activity via carnosic acid.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Rosemary oil shown comparable to minoxidil for hair growth in clinical trial.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Topical essential oil diluted in carrier oil, massaged into scalp daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: TCM kidney-jing tonic traditionally used to reverse premature graying and hair loss.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Revered in Chinese medicine as a premier hair and longevity tonic.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Prepared (processed) form only; 3-6g daily as decoction.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Extremely high vitamin C and tannin content strengthens hair shaft and adds shine.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Used extensively in Ayurvedic hair care for strength and luster.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Hair oil or powder mask applied 1-2x weekly; 1-2 tsp powder daily internally.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Silica and mineral content supports keratin formation and hair resilience.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Long-standing European tradition as a hair-strengthening herb.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Long infusion (4+ hours) provides maximum mineral extraction.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Alterative that supports liver detoxification and blood purification, clearing skin from within.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Traditional blood cleanser used for acne, eczema, and skin eruptions across multiple herbal traditions.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Root decoction 2-3 cups daily, or tincture 2-4ml 3x daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties soothe and heal inflamed skin.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Well-established wound healer and skin soother with clinical evidence for dermatological use.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Topical salve or wash applied 2-3x daily; tea used internally.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Alterative and blood-purifying properties support skin clarity; isoflavones benefit skin health.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Traditional blood cleanser with emerging evidence for skin-supportive isoflavones.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Infusion 2-3 cups daily, or tincture 2-4ml 3x daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Rich in omega-7 fatty acids that nourish skin from within, plus vitamins C and E for collagen support.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for improving skin hydration, elasticity, and wound healing.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: 1-2 tsp oil daily internally, or topical application.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Triterpenoid saponins stimulate collagen synthesis and improve skin firmness.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for wound healing and collagen production; used in Ayurvedic and TCM skin care.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized extract 60-120mg daily, or fresh leaf tea.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Mucopolysaccharides support moisture retention; promotes fibroblast activity for skin repair.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Extensive clinical use for skin hydration, healing, and anti-aging.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Topical gel applied liberally; internal gel 1-2 tbsp daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Astringent and anti-inflammatory properties traditionally used to strengthen and protect eyes.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Primary eye herb in Western tradition; used for centuries for all manner of eye complaints.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tea used as eyewash (strained and cooled) or taken internally 2-3 cups daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Improves microcirculation to the retina and provides antioxidant protection to ocular tissues.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for improving retinal blood flow and supporting macular health.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized extract 120-240mg daily in divided doses.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Proanthocyanidins provide potent antioxidant protection for retinal tissues.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Strong antioxidant activity with affinity for eye tissues; clinical evidence for visual fatigue.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Extract 150-300mg daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Anti-inflammatory and soothing properties calm tired, irritated eyes.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Traditional eye wash; widely used compress for eye strain and irritation.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Cooled tea bags as eye compress for 10-15 minutes.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Eugenol provides powerful antimicrobial and analgesic action in the oral cavity.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Dentistry's most traditional herbal remedy; eugenol is still used in dental materials.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Diluted clove oil applied topically to gums; whole cloves chewed gently.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Astringent and antimicrobial resin tightens gum tissue and fights oral pathogens.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Ancient oral remedy used across Egyptian, Greek, and Ayurvedic traditions.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tincture diluted as mouthwash, or myrrh-based toothpaste.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Broad-spectrum antimicrobial that targets oral pathogens while supporting healthy oral ecology.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Neem sticks (datun) are one of the oldest oral hygiene tools; clinical evidence for plaque reduction.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Neem mouthwash or neem stick chewing; neem leaf tea.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Antimicrobial and astringent properties support healthy oral flora and reduce gum inflammation.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Traditional European mouth rinse for sore throats and gum health.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Strong sage tea used as mouth rinse 2-3x daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidins strengthen cardiac contractility and coronary blood flow.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Among the most clinically studied cardiotonic herbs; used in European cardiology.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized extract 160-900mg daily; berry tea 2-3 cups daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Anthocyanins and organic acids support healthy blood pressure and vascular function.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Multiple clinical trials show significant blood pressure reduction with daily use.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tea 2-3 cups daily using 1-2 tsp dried calyces per cup.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Capsaicin dilates blood vessels and stimulates peripheral circulation immediately.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Fastest-acting circulatory stimulant in the herbal repertoire.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Small pinch in warm water or food; tincture 5-10 drops in water.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Warming gingerols improve peripheral blood flow and reduce blood viscosity.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Well-documented circulatory stimulant with extensive clinical evidence.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Fresh root tea 2-3 cups daily, or 1-2g dried ginger daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Improves microcirculation and blood flow to brain and extremities via platelet-activating factor inhibition.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: One of the most clinically studied herbs for cerebral and peripheral circulation.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized extract 120-240mg daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Polysaccharides stimulate macrophage activity and increase T-cell proliferation.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Premier immune tonic in Traditional Chinese Medicine with extensive clinical evidence.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Decoction of dried root 9-15g daily; often simmered in soups.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Beta-glucans and triterpenes modulate immune function, enhancing both innate and adaptive immunity.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Revered as the 'mushroom of immortality'; strong clinical evidence for immunomodulation.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Extract 1-3g daily, or decoction simmered 2+ hours.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Alkylamides and polysaccharides activate macrophages and increase phagocytic activity.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Most researched Western immune herb; best used at onset of illness or for prevention.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tincture 2-4ml 3x daily during acute phase; lower dose for maintenance.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Anthocyanins and lectins inhibit viral attachment and replication; boost cytokine production.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for reducing duration and severity of cold and flu infections.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Syrup 1 tbsp 2-4x daily during acute illness; 1 tbsp daily for prevention.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Allicin provides broad-spectrum antimicrobial activity against bacteria, viruses, and fungi.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: One of nature's most potent antimicrobials with extensive clinical validation.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: 2-3 raw cloves daily (crushed, rested 10 min before use); aged garlic extract.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Carvacrol and thymol are potent antimicrobials effective against a wide range of pathogens.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Strong in vitro evidence for antimicrobial activity; traditional Mediterranean immune support.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Oil of oregano 2-3 drops in water 2-3x daily (short term); tea for milder use.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Curcumin inhibits NF-kB, COX-2, and multiple inflammatory pathways simultaneously.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: One of the most clinically studied anti-inflammatory botanicals in existence.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized curcumin 500-1000mg daily with black pepper for absorption.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Boswellic acids inhibit 5-lipoxygenase, a key enzyme in the inflammatory cascade.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for joint inflammation, gut inflammation, and respiratory inflammation.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized boswellia extract 300-500mg 2-3x daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Gingerols and shogaols inhibit prostaglandin synthesis and reduce inflammatory cytokines.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for pain and inflammation reduction comparable to some NSAIDs.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Fresh root 2-4g daily; dried ginger 1-2g daily; tea 2-3 cups.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Withanolides modulate the immune system to produce appropriate but not excessive inflammation.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Adaptogenic action helps calibrate inflammatory response to stressors.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized extract 300-600mg daily, or root powder 3-6g daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Pentacyclic oxindole alkaloids modulate NF-kB and support balanced immune activation.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Traditional Amazonian immune modulator with clinical evidence for inflammatory balance.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized extract 250-350mg daily; bark decoction 1-2 cups daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Intensely bitter compounds stimulate digestive enzyme production and bile flow.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: The quintessential bitter digestive tonic; used in virtually every European bitter formula.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Bitter tincture 10-20 drops before meals; tea sipped 15 min before eating.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Promotes gastric motility, stimulates digestive enzymes, and reduces nausea.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: One of the most versatile digestive herbs with extensive clinical evidence.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Fresh ginger tea before or after meals; 1-2g dried ginger daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Carminative volatile oils relax intestinal smooth muscle and reduce gas and bloating.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Classic digestive carminative safe for all ages; widely used in Ayurveda and Western herbalism.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Chew seeds after meals, or tea 1-3 cups daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Mucilage coats and soothes inflamed mucous membranes throughout the digestive tract.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: One of the most effective demulcent herbs for gut lining repair; FDA-recognized.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Powder mixed with water as gruel, 1-2 tbsp 2-3x daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Root mucilage forms a protective film over inflamed GI tissue, promoting healing.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Traditional gut-soothing herb used for ulcers, gastritis, and intestinal inflammation.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Cold infusion (root soaked overnight) 2-3 cups daily; powder 2-5g daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Silymarin protects hepatocytes from toxin damage and stimulates liver cell regeneration.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: The gold standard hepatoprotective herb with extensive clinical evidence.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized silymarin extract 140-420mg daily in divided doses.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Root stimulates bile production and flow; supports Phase I and Phase II detoxification.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Traditional liver and digestive tonic used worldwide; root specifically for liver support.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Root decoction 2-3 cups daily, or roasted root as coffee substitute.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Cynarin and chlorogenic acid protect liver cells and stimulate bile production.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for improving liver enzyme levels and lipid metabolism.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Leaf extract 320-640mg 3x daily before meals.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Alterative that supports liver, lymphatic, and skin elimination pathways simultaneously.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Classic blood cleanser in Western, TCM, and Ayurvedic traditions.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Root decoction 2-3 cups daily; tincture 2-4ml 3x daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Lymphatic tonic that promotes fluid movement and waste clearance through the lymphatic system.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Premier lymphatic herb in Western herbalism; supports kidney and skin elimination too.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Fresh juice 2-3 tbsp daily; cold infusion 2-3 cups daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Saponins and mucilage tonify respiratory tissue and support healthy mucus production.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: One of the most widely used respiratory herbs across Western traditions.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tea 2-3 cups daily (strain well through cloth); tincture 2-4ml 3x daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Inulin and alantolactone tonify respiratory tissue and have antimicrobial properties.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Traditional pulmonary tonic especially valued for chronic respiratory conditions.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Root decoction 1-2 cups daily; tincture 1-3ml 3x daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: 1,8-cineole opens airways, thins mucus, and provides antimicrobial protection.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for relieving respiratory congestion and supporting airway clearance.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Steam inhalation with 3-5 drops essential oil; chest rub with diluted oil.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Thymol and carvacrol are potent antimicrobials with expectorant and bronchospasmolytic action.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Approved by German Commission E for bronchitis and upper respiratory infections.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tea 2-3 cups daily; tincture 2-4ml 3x daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Flavonoids bind to GABA receptors, calming nervous system excitability without heavy sedation.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Premier nervine tonic for anxiety, nervous tension, and overstimulation.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tincture (fresh plant preferred) 2-4ml 3x daily; tea 2-3 cups daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Rosmarinic acid and volatile oils calm the nervous system and improve mood.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for reducing anxiety and improving calm alertness.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tea 2-3 cups daily; tincture 2-4ml 3x daily; fresh leaves in food.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Hericenones and erinacines stimulate nerve growth factor (NGF) synthesis for nerve repair.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Unique among medicinal mushrooms for directly supporting nerve regeneration; clinical evidence.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Extract 500-1000mg 2x daily; powder 3-5g daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Asiaticoside supports nerve regeneration and improves nerve conduction velocity.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Ayurvedic brain and nerve tonic with emerging clinical evidence for neuroprotection.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Fresh leaves 2-4 daily; standardized extract 60-120mg daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Withanolides modulate the HPA axis, reducing cortisol and improving stress recovery.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: One of the most clinically studied adaptogens; significant evidence for stress resilience.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized extract 300-600mg daily; root powder 3-6g daily in warm milk.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Rosavins and salidroside enhance stress resistance and mental performance under pressure.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Strong clinical evidence for reducing fatigue and improving performance during stress.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized extract 200-400mg daily, taken in the morning.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Eugenol and ursolic acid normalize cortisol and support balanced stress response.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Revered Ayurvedic adaptogen with clinical evidence for stress, anxiety, and fatigue.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tea 2-3 cups daily; extract 300-600mg daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Chrysin and other flavonoids modulate GABA receptors, promoting calm without drowsiness.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for anxiety reduction comparable to some benzodiazepines.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tea 1-2 cups in the evening; tincture 2-4ml as needed.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Linalool and linalyl acetate reduce sympathetic nervous system activation and promote calm.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for anxiety reduction via oral supplementation and aromatherapy.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tea 1-2 cups daily; essential oil diffusion; oral capsule 80mg daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Valerenic acid increases GABA availability, promoting deep sleep without morning grogginess.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Among the most studied sleep herbs; clinical evidence for improved sleep latency and quality.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tincture 2-5ml or extract 300-600mg, 30-60 minutes before bed.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Apigenin binds to benzodiazepine receptors, inducing mild sedation and relaxation.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Gentle, widely tolerated sleep aid with clinical evidence for sleep quality improvement.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Strong tea (2-3 bags) 30 minutes before bed; extract 200-400mg.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: 2-methylbutenol acts as a mild sedative; synergizes with valerian for enhanced sleep effects.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence especially strong when combined with valerian for sleep support.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tincture 1-2ml before bed; often combined with valerian.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Regulates cortisol patterns, helping restore natural cortisol-melatonin cycling.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for normalizing sleep-wake cycles through HPA axis regulation.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: 300-600mg standardized extract in the evening.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Improves cerebral blood flow and provides antioxidant protection to brain tissue.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: One of the most studied nootropic herbs with evidence for memory and concentration.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized extract 120-240mg daily in divided doses.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Bacosides enhance synaptic communication and support memory consolidation.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Ayurvedic nootropic with strong clinical evidence for memory, learning, and focus.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized extract 300-450mg daily; traditionally taken with ghee.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: 1,8-cineole and carnosic acid improve cerebral circulation and acetylcholine availability.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Traditional memory herb; clinical evidence for improved cognitive performance and alertness.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tea 1-2 cups daily; aromatherapy inhalation; fresh herb in cooking.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Promotes nerve growth factor synthesis, supporting neuroplasticity and neuroprotection.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Unique neuroprotective mushroom with clinical evidence for cognitive preservation.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Extract 500-1000mg 2x daily; whole fruiting body in cooking.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Curcumin crosses the blood-brain barrier, reducing neuroinflammation and amyloid plaque formation.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Emerging clinical evidence for neuroprotection and cognitive preservation.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Curcumin extract 500-1000mg daily with piperine for absorption.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Hypericin and hyperforin modulate serotonin, dopamine, and norepinephrine reuptake.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence comparable to SSRIs for mild-to-moderate mood support.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized extract 300mg 3x daily. Important: many drug interactions.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Crocin and safranal modulate serotonergic and dopaminergic pathways.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Multiple clinical trials show efficacy comparable to conventional mood support medications.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized extract 30mg daily, or culinary use of stigmas.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Rosmarinic acid inhibits GABA transaminase, increasing calming GABA availability.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for reducing agitation and improving emotional stability.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tea 2-3 cups daily; tincture 2-4ml 3x daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Volatile oils and flavonoids support heart-centered calm and emotional opening.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Traditional heart herb across Persian, Ayurvedic, and Western traditions for emotional balance.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Rose petal tea 2-3 cups daily; rose water; rose hip tea.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Iridoid glycosides modulate prolactin and support progesterone balance through pituitary action.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for PMS, cycle irregularity, and hormonal balance.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized extract 20-40mg daily in the morning; tincture 1-3ml daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Macamides and macaenes support endocrine function without directly containing hormones.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for hormonal balance, libido, and menopausal symptom relief.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Gelatinized powder 1.5-3g daily; traditionally cooked, not raw.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: May support thyroid hormone synthesis through HPA-HPT axis normalization.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for subclinical hypothyroid support; use cautiously with hyperthyroidism.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized extract 300-600mg daily. Monitor thyroid levels.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Rich in calcium, magnesium, silica, and vitamin K — key minerals for bone matrix formation.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Long infusions provide highly bioavailable minerals for bone support.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Long infusion (4+ hours) 2-3 cups daily for maximum mineral extraction.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Allantoin promotes bone cell proliferation and accelerates fracture healing.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Traditional bone-knitting herb; the name 'comfrey' derives from Latin for 'knit together.'
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Topical use only (poultice or salve on unbroken skin); internal use not recommended.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Curcumin reduces joint inflammation and protects cartilage from degradation.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for improving joint comfort and mobility, comparable to some NSAIDs.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Curcumin extract 500-1000mg daily with piperine.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Harpagoside reduces inflammation and pain in joints, supporting comfortable movement.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for joint pain and stiffness, particularly in osteoarthritis.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized extract providing 50-100mg harpagoside daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Sesquiterpene lactones reduce inflammation and promote tissue repair after physical stress.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for reducing post-exercise soreness and bruising. Topical use only.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Topical gel or cream applied to sore areas 2-3x daily. Do not use on broken skin.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Curcumin reduces exercise-induced inflammation and oxidative stress, speeding recovery.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for reduced DOMS and faster return to baseline after exercise.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Curcumin extract 500mg before and after exercise.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Viopudial and scopoletin relax smooth and skeletal muscle, reducing spasms.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Traditional antispasmodic; valued for menstrual cramps, back spasms, and general muscle tension.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tincture 2-4ml 3x daily; bark decoction 1-2 cups daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Valerenic acid and isovaleric acid have muscle-relaxant properties via GABA modulation.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Known primarily for sleep but also effective for muscle relaxation and tension.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tincture 2-4ml as needed; tea 1-2 cups for muscle tension.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Cordycepin supports ATP production and improves oxygen utilization at the cellular level.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for improved exercise performance, oxygen uptake, and reduced fatigue.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Extract 1-3g daily; traditionally simmered as tea.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Rosavins enhance mitochondrial energy production and reduce mental and physical fatigue.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for improving energy, endurance, and reducing fatigue without stimulation.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized extract 200-400mg in the morning.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Macamides support sustained energy through adrenal and endocrine nourishment.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Traditional Andean energy food with clinical evidence for improved stamina and vitality.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Gelatinized powder 1.5-3g daily in smoothies or warm drinks.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Reduces cortisol, supports adrenal function, and improves mitochondrial health.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for significant reductions in fatigue and improved energy levels.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Standardized extract 300-600mg daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Lignans enhance cellular energy production and protect against oxidative stress-induced fatigue.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Traditional Chinese adaptogen for exhaustion; clinical evidence for physical and mental endurance.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Dried berries 1-3g daily as tea; tincture 2-4ml 2x daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Triterpenes and polysaccharides provide antioxidant protection and support immune surveillance.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Revered longevity mushroom in TCM with evidence for cellular protection and immune modulation.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Extract 1-3g daily; dual extraction (water + alcohol) for full compound profile.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: EGCG is a potent antioxidant that protects cells from oxidative damage and supports autophagy.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Extensive epidemiological and clinical evidence for cellular protection and healthy aging.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: 2-4 cups daily; matcha provides higher EGCG concentration.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Traditional kidney-jing tonic believed to preserve vitality and delay aging signs.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Premier longevity herb in TCM; supports hair, bones, reproductive function, and vitality.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Prepared (zhi) form only; 3-6g daily as decoction. Avoid raw form.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Cycloastragenol may support telomerase activity; polysaccharides enhance immune longevity.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Traditional Chinese longevity tonic with emerging telomere research.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Dried root 9-15g daily in soups or decoctions.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Steroidal saponins nourish reproductive tissues and support healthy ovulatory cycles.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Premier Ayurvedic female reproductive tonic; name means 'she who possesses 100 husbands.'
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Root powder 3-6g daily in warm milk; extract 500mg 2x daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Supports hormonal balance and reproductive function in both men and women.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for improved sperm parameters and hormonal fertility markers.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Gelatinized powder 2-3g daily for at least 3 months.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Flavonoids and volatile oils have traditional aphrodisiac and reproductive tonic properties.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Traditional Mesoamerican aphrodisiac with some clinical support for sexual function.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tea 1-2 cups daily; tincture 2-4ml 2x daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Lupeol and other compounds support sexual desire and function through multiple pathways.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Amazonian potency herb with clinical evidence for sexual function improvement.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Extract 1-1.5g daily; bark decoction 1-2 cups daily.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Gentle diuretic action supports kidney filtration without depleting potassium.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Traditional kidney-supportive herb used across European herbal traditions.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Leaf tea 2-3 cups daily; seed tincture for more direct kidney support.

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Arbutin converts to hydroquinone in alkaline urine, providing targeted urinary antimicrobial action.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Clinical evidence for preventing recurrent UTIs; traditional urinary antiseptic.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tea or extract providing 400-800mg arbutin daily. Short-term use only (1-2 weeks).

plant_wellness_mappings.mechanism: Diosphenol and volatile oils provide antiseptic and anti-inflammatory support to the urinary tract.
plant_wellness_mappings.efficacy_notes: Traditional South African urinary remedy with antimicrobial properties.
plant_wellness_mappings.dosage_notes: Tea 2-3 cups daily; tincture 2-4ml 3x daily.
